title: EdiblePotions
description: Infuse potion effects into food using a fully automatable Infusion Table.
body:
# 🍎 Edible Potions

**Edible Potions** brings a new layer of strategy to Minecraft survival by allowing you to infuse food with potion effects. Stop wasting time drinking potions during intense battles—just take a bite and get the buff instantly!

![Banner Image](https://i.imgur.com/7YSttFa.png)

## ✨ Main Features

* **🧪 The Infusion Table:** A brand new workstation designed to combine food and potions. It fits perfectly into the vanilla aesthetic.
* **⚡ Instant Effects:** Infused food applies potion effects immediately upon consumption. No more slow drinking animations!
* **⚖️ Balanced Gameplay:** The Infusion Table is crafted with mid-to-late game materials (Gold, Diamond, Obsidian) to ensure balance.
* **⚙️ Full Automation:** Designed for technical players! The Infusion Table is fully compatible with Hoppers and pipes.
* **🌐 Cross-Platform:** One mod, two loaders. Works seamlessly on both **Forge** and **Fabric** (Minecraft 1.20.1).

---

## 🛠️ Automation Guide

The Infusion Table is a **WorldlyContainer**, meaning it interacts with automation blocks logically:

* **Top Face (⬆️):** Input **Food** (e.g., Apple, Bread, Beef).
* **Side Faces (⬅️➡️):** Input **Potions** (e.g., Potion of Night Vision).
* **Bottom Face (⬇️):** Extract **Infused Food** and **Empty Glass Bottles**.

This allows you to build a fully automatic factory that turns raw food and brewed potions into powerful edible buffs!

---

## 📦 Installation

This mod uses **Architectury API** to run on multiple platforms.

* **For Fabric:**
    * Install [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)
    * Install [Architectury API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api)
* **For Forge:**
    * Install [Architectury API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api)

---

## 🇨🇳 中文介绍 (Chinese Description)

**食用药剂 (Edible Potions)** 是一个轻量级且功能强大的模组，允许你将药水效果“注入”到食物中。告别战斗中繁琐的喝药动作——吃下一颗苹果，瞬间获得夜视或力量效果！

### ✨ 主要功能

* **注能台 (Infusion Table):** 全新的工作台，用于制作注能食物，完美融入原版画风。
* **瞬间生效:** 食用注能食物后立即获得药水效果，无需等待喝药动画。
* **自动化支持:** 专为红石和生电玩家设计！
    * **上方输入:** 食物
    * **侧面输入:** 药水
    * **下方输出:** 成品 & 空瓶子
* **双端支持:** 同时支持 **Forge** 和 **Fabric** (1.20.1)。

### 🧩 依赖项

本模组需要 **Architectury API** 作为前置。
* **Fabric 用户:** 请同时安装 Fabric API 和 Architectury API。
* **Forge 用户:** 仅需安装 Architectury API。
